tarot.name: The Star
tarot.uprightMeaning: Hope, faith, renewal, inspiration, serenity, spirituality, and the promise of good things to come. After challenges, you emerge renewed with a clear sense of purpose.
tarot.reversedMeaning: Lack of faith, despair, discouragement, feeling disconnected from the universe's guidance.
tarot.tipOfDay: Allow yourself to receive. The universe is pouring blessings toward you — your only task is to open your hands and heart.

answers.answer: The stars align in your favor.
A resounding yes from the cosmos.
Without a doubt, the universe says yes.
The signs are promising — move forward.
Seek more clarity before you act.
The cosmos remains silent on this matter.
Mercury's position clouds the answer — try again.
The stars advise caution at this time.
Not now — but the tides will shift.
Shadows obscure the path — patience is needed.

suggestedQuestions: Will this week bring good news?
Is this the right path for me?

loveTip: Open your heart to what arrives unannounced today. Venus is weaving connections you cannot yet see — trust the invisible threads.
loveDetail: Your emotional world is rich with possibility right now. Venus in a harmonious position to your chart ruler creates an undeniable magnetism. Whether single or partnered, this is a day for authentic expression over performance. Say the thing you've been holding back. The stars support your vulnerability.
dos: Trust your first instinct in all interactions
Begin a creative project you've been postponing
Reach out to someone who matters to you
Spend time in nature to ground your energy
donts: Avoid making irreversible financial decisions today
Don't engage in arguments that drain your energy
Resist the urge to overanalyze others' motives
Don't neglect your body's need for rest
luckyNumberExplanation: Seven resonates with Neptune, your spiritual guide, and aligns with the Chariot's energy of purposeful movement. When you see this number today, treat it as a cosmic wink — you are exactly where you need to be.
trendingQuestion: Where on Earth will your stars align with destiny?
